rationale_source: F1.LA range-ambiguity resolution per Layer 3 #17 recommended-default (c) flag-for-broker-disambiguation

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker phrases LA as range ($250k-$300k); F1.LA cannot resolve to single value. Per Layer 3 #17 recommended-default (c): no canonical value set; broker disambiguation requested.

loan_amount_ambiguity_detected.rationale: Range pattern in broker source triggers ambiguity flag.

must_include.rationale: Vienna asks broker to specify exact LA value per Layer 3 #17 recommended-default.

layer3_pending_decisions.scope: loan_amount range ambiguity resolution: midpoint vs high-end vs disambiguation-request vs broker-prompt
